Home / Services / Pool Removal

Pool Removal

Complete pool demolitions for Houston homeowners.

Houston's high water table makes pool removal complex—we've filled 300+ pools across Harris County without drainage issues.

Vinyl-lined pools in The Woodlands require different removal than Houston's common gunite pools. We compact fill dirt in layers to prevent future settling in our clay soil. All permits include Harris County groundwater protection checks.

Our process prevents mosquito breeding—a critical concern in Houston's humid climate. We leave your yard ready for landscaping or expansion.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Water drainage plan (varies by Houston neighborhood)
  2. 02 Step 2: Structural demolition
  3. 03 Step 3: Soil compaction testing
  4. 04 Step 4: Final grading

Benefits

  • Prevents Houston's common pool collapse hazards
  • Proper disposal of chlorine/chemicals
  • Knows Houston's water table variations
  • No lingering debris

Frequently Asked Questions

Why do Houston pools need special removal?

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with pool removal? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-dem-rq18
